pr.title: Record: 1.0722 BPB — Improved TTT + HedgeMixer with Per-Layer LR Groups

output.summary: Per-layer TTT LR groups plus a cosine decay, extra epoch, and fewer frozen blocks let HedgeMixer prep its chunk-by-chunk adaptation while folding sliding eval into TTT.
techniques: - per-layer LR groups targeting output vs input projections
- cosine TTT schedule with 4 epochs and one frozen block
- reuse TTT scoring to replace standalone sliding-window eval
